Text.Page:
Crafting for the War Effort

Assist with the creation of an alcemical bandage.
Some materials are required from Lenka in Pora Elinu for bandages, but there has been no sign of them. Perhaps a visit is in order to find out what happened?

Tidak needs moonlight fruit? Fruit is for feeding—not bandaging!

Tell Tidak to go pick flowers. Fibers make bandages. Every cub knows that.

The popori doesn't understand. The mind boggles. Ah, well.

Perhaps one who understands my recipe would be more convincing...
